findings.title: Matter tenant was unverified when matter_id was present and matter_tenant_id was omitted
findings.disposition: precheckControlPlaneTenantBoundary now rejects missing matter_tenant_id when the S02-normalized request has matter_id; policy, contract fail_closed_on, validator, and tests cover missing_matter_tenant_id_when_matter_id_present.

findings.title: Allow decision can carry pre-existing blocked_claim_refs from S02
findings.disposition: Added an explicit regression test showing prior blocked_claim_refs are carried forward while tenant_boundary_decision remains scoped to tenant-boundary mismatches; no fail-open behavior exists.

findings.title: Optional tests for matter_id present without matter_tenant_id
findings.disposition: Added fail-closed tests for missing matter_tenant_id when matter_id is present.

findings.title: Record S03 closeout evidence
findings.disposition: packet.json, command-evidence.json, claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json are recorded for S03.

findings.title: Run local validation after evidence materialization
findings.disposition: Final validation reruns npm run rp00:control-plane:validate, focused service tests, and the full local test suite after evidence materialization.

raw_review_summary: Claude approved the S03 tenant-boundary precheck slice with no P0/P1 findings. The review confirmed deterministic no-write scope, S02-normalized request dependency, fail-closed tenant mismatch and bypass handling, no runtime routing, no service execution, no real data, no product-state writes, no registry/state mutation, RP00.P02.M00-only completion, and no RP00/RP00.P02 completion claim. P2/P3 findings were fixed before closeout without a second Claude review.
